name: sunken ship
hints: A sunken ship on the ocean floor with a jeweled chest treasure.
GET CHEST - it's one of the 13 treasures. UP returns to the undersea area.
GET the *Jeweled chest* treasure. UP returns to the undersea area (room 12). You need the face mask to survive down here.
Collect the jeweled chest and go UP. Make sure you have the face mask or you'll drown.
notes: Sunken ship at the bottom of the sea. Contains the *Jeweled chest* treasure. UP returns to the undersea area (room 12). Requires the face mask for underwater breathing. Accessed by diving down from the undersea area.
